majorTuition.zh:
多大国际生学费按专业差异巨大：
• 人文社科：C$42,680/年
• 理科：C$47,230/年
• 商学(Rotman)：C$57,020/年
• 工程/CS：C$62,250/年
majorTuition.en:
U of T international tuition varies dramatically by program:
• Arts/Humanities: C$42,680/yr
• Science: C$47,230/yr
• Commerce (Rotman): C$57,020/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$62,250/yr

desc.zh: 加拿大排名第一的综合性研究型大学，位于多伦多市中心。三大校区（圣乔治、密西沙加、士嘉堡）提供700+本科专业，学术声誉享誉全球。
desc.en: Canada's top-ranked comprehensive research university, located in downtown Toronto. Three campuses (St. George, Mississauga, Scarborough) offer 700+ undergraduate programs with world-class academic reputation.

safetyDetail.zh: 多伦多是加拿大最大城市，整体治安良好。校园有24小时安保巡逻和蓝光紧急电话系统。市中心部分区域夜间需注意安全，建议避免深夜独行。
safetyDetail.en: Toronto is Canada's largest city with generally good safety. Campus has 24/7 security patrols and blue-light emergency phones. Exercise caution in some downtown areas at night.

climate.zh: 四季分明，冬季寒冷（-7°C至-1°C），常有降雪。夏季温暖宜人（20-27°C）。需准备防寒衣物。
climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-7°C to -1°C) with frequent snow. Pleasant summers (20-27°C). Warm clothing essential.

visa.zh: Study Permit学习许可 → 毕业后可申请PGWP工签（最长3年）→ 积累工作经验后通过Express Entry快速通道申请永久居留(PR)。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好，安省还有省提名项目(OINP)。
visa.en: Study Permit → Post-Graduation Work Permit (PGWP, up to 3 years) → Permanent Residency via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP). Canada has immigrant-friendly policies for international graduates.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$12,000-18,000/年
🏢 校外租房：市中心Studio约C$1,800-2,400/月
📍 推荐区域：Annex、Harbord Village、Kensington附近
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$12,000-18,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Downtown studio ~C$1,800-2,400/mo
📍 Recommended areas: Annex, Harbord Village, near Kensington

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约78%，六年毕业率约85%。学术要求较高，建议充分利用学术辅导资源。
graduationRate.en: 4-year graduation rate ~78%, 6-year rate ~85%. Academically demanding; students are encouraged to use academic support services.

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约89%
💼 知名雇主：五大银行、四大会计师事务所、科技公司（Google、Amazon多伦多办公室）
🌟 校友网络庞大，Bay Street金融中心就业机会丰富
employment.en:
📊 ~89% employed within 6 months of graduation
💼 Top employers: Big Five banks, Big Four accounting, tech (Google, Amazon Toronto)
🌟 Vast alumni network; proximity to Bay Street financial district

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP（University Health Insurance Plan），约C$756/年，覆盖基本医疗。看病需先预约家庭医生或去Walk-in Clinic。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP (University Health Insurance Plan), ~C$756/yr, covering basic medical care. Visit family doctor or walk-in clinic for appointments.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC（安大略省大学申请中心）105通道
📅 截止日期：1月15日
💰 申请费：C$180（OUAC）+ 各专业补充材料费
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、个人陈述、补充申请（部分专业需视频面试）
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC (Ontario Universities' Application Centre) Stream 105
📅 Deadline: January 15
💰 Fee: C$180 (OUAC) + supplementary fees per program
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, personal statement, supplementary application (some programs require video interview)

city.zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省 温哥华

majorTuition.zh:
UBC国际生学费因专业不同：
• 文科：C$42,803/年
• 理科：C$47,937/年
• 商学(Sauder)：C$55,500/年
• 工程/应用科学：C$59,000/年
majorTuition.en:
UBC international tuition by program:
• Arts: C$42,803/yr
• Science: C$47,937/yr
• Commerce (Sauder): C$55,500/yr
• Engineering/Applied Science: C$59,000/yr

desc.zh: 位于温哥华西海岸的世界顶尖公立研究型大学，校园依山傍海，被评为全球最美校园之一。Sauder商学院和工程学院享有盛誉，Co-op项目丰富。
desc.en: A world-class public research university on Vancouver's west coast, with one of the most beautiful campuses globally. Renowned Sauder School of Business and Engineering, with strong co-op programs.

safetyDetail.zh: 温哥华多年被评为全球最宜居城市之一，治安良好。UBC校园位于半岛尽头，环境安全封闭。校园安保完善，有免费夜间班车服务。
safetyDetail.en: Vancouver consistently ranked among world's most livable cities. UBC campus is on a peninsula with secure, enclosed environment. Campus security and free night shuttle available.

climate.zh: 温和的海洋性气候，冬季温和多雨（3-8°C），少有降雪。夏季凉爽舒适（15-22°C）。雨季（10月-3月）需备雨具。
climate.en: Mild oceanic climate. Warm, rainy winters (3-8°C) with rare snow. Cool, comfortable summers (15-22°C). Rain gear essential for October-March rainy season.

visa.zh: Study Permit学习许可 → 毕业后可申请PGWP工签（最长3年）→ 通过Express Entry或BC省提名(BC PNP)申请永久居留。BC省对留学生移民政策优惠，科技类毕业生可走Tech Pilot快速通道。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or BC PNP. BC province offers favorable immigration for graduates; tech graduates can use BC Tech Pilot fast track.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$11,000-16,000/年
🏢 校外租房：校区周边Studio约C$1,600-2,200/月
📍 推荐区域：Wesbrook Village、University Village、Dunbar
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$11,000-16,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Near-campus studio ~C$1,600-2,200/mo
📍 Recommended: Wesbrook Village, University Village, Dunbar

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约80%，六年毕业率约87%。学术支持资源丰富，包括学术指导中心和同伴辅导。
graduationRate.en: 4-year graduation rate ~80%, 6-year rate ~87%. Rich academic support including advising centre and peer tutoring.

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约90%
💼 温哥华科技产业蓬勃：Amazon、Microsoft、SAP、EA均设有办公室
🌟 Co-op项目覆盖广泛，商学院就业率极高
employment.en:
📊 ~90% employed within 6 months
💼 Vancouver tech hub: Amazon, Microsoft, SAP, EA offices
🌟 Extensive co-op programs; Sauder grads have excellent placement rates

healthcare.zh: ✅ BC省国际学生可加入MSP（Medical Services Plan），等待期后享受与本地居民相同的基本医疗保障。学校另有补充健康保险iMED覆盖处方药、牙科、视力等。
healthcare.en: ✅ BC international students eligible for MSP (Medical Services Plan) after waiting period, same basic coverage as residents. UBC also provides iMED supplementary insurance for prescriptions, dental, vision.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过UBC官网在线申请
📅 截止日期：1月15日
💰 申请费：C$116.25
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、个人简介（Personal Profile）
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via UBC website
📅 Deadline: January 15
💰 Fee: C$116.25
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, Personal Profile essay

city.zh: 魁北克省 蒙特利尔

majorTuition.zh: 麦吉尔大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$38,236-C$55,600/年。
majorTuition.en: McGill University international tuition varies: C$38,236-C$55,600/yr.

desc.zh: 被誉为加拿大的哈佛，麦吉尔是加拿大历史最悠久的英语大学之一。医学、法学世界领先。
desc.en: Known as the Harvard of Canada, McGill is one of Canada's oldest English universities. World-leading in medicine and law.

safetyDetail.zh: 麦吉尔大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: McGill University campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

visa.zh: Study Permit → 毕业后PGWP工签(最长3年) → Express Entry申请PR。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry. Canada has immigration-friendly policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 大一通常保证校内住宿（需提前申请）。校内约C$10,000-16,000/年。
housing.en: Freshman housing typically guaranteed (apply early). On-campus ~C$10,000-16,000/yr.

graduationRate.zh: 毕业率良好，学术支持完善。
graduationRate.en: Good graduation rates with strong academic support.

employment.zh: 加拿大就业市场稳定，Co-op项目提供实习机会。
employment.en: Stable Canadian job market. Co-op programs provide internship opportunities.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 可申请RAMQ魁省医保（部分国家学生免费）。校内Health Centre提供医疗服务。
healthcare.en: ✅ 可申请RAMQ魁省医保（部分国家学生免费）。On-campusHealth Centre提供医疗服务。

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向McGill申请
📅 截止日期：1月15日-3月1日
💰 申请费：C$100-180
📝 所需材料：成绩单、个人简介、TOEFL/IELTS
✅ 大部分不要求SAT/ACT
application.en:
📋 Platform: 直接向McGill申请
📅 Deadline: Jan 15 - Mar 1
💰 Fee: C$100-180
📝 Required: Transcripts, personal profile, TOEFL/IELTS
✅ SAT/ACT generally not required

city.zh: 安大略省 汉密尔顿

majorTuition.zh: 麦克马斯特大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$36,100-C$48,262/年。
majorTuition.en: McMaster University international tuition varies: C$36,100-C$48,262/yr.

desc.zh: 麦克马斯特大学以医学院闻名，其PBL教学法被全球医学院效仿。工程和商学也很强。
desc.en: McMaster is famous for its medical school and PBL teaching method adopted globally. Engineering and business are also strong.

safetyDetail.zh: 麦克马斯特大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: McMaster University campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

visa.zh: Study Permit → 毕业后PGWP工签(最长3年) → Express Entry申请PR。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好。

housing.en: Freshman housing typically guaranteed (apply early). On-campus ~C$10,000-16,000/yr.

graduationRate.zh: 毕业率良好，学术支持完善。
graduationRate.en: Good graduation rates with strong academic support.

employment.zh: 加拿大就业市场稳定，Co-op项目提供实习机会。
employment.en: Stable Canadian job market. Co-op programs provide internship opportunities.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 强制购买UHIP保险约C$756/年。安大略省国际学生不享受OHIP。校内Health Centre提供基础医疗。
healthcare.en: ✅ MandatoryUHIP保险约C$756/年。安大略省国际学生不享受OHIP。On-campusHealth Centre提供基础医疗。

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105
📅 截止日期：1月15日-3月1日
💰 申请费：C$100-180
📝 所需材料：成绩单、个人简介、TOEFL/IELTS
✅ 大部分不要求SAT/ACT
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC 105
📅 Deadline: Jan 15 - Mar 1
💰 Fee: C$100-180
📝 Required: Transcripts, personal profile, TOEFL/IELTS
✅ SAT/ACT generally not required

city.zh: 阿尔伯塔省 埃德蒙顿

majorTuition.zh: 阿尔伯塔大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$33,058-C$40,966/年。
majorTuition.en: University of Alberta international tuition varies: C$33,058-C$40,966/yr.

desc.zh: 阿尔伯塔大学AI研究全球领先（强化学习之父Rich Sutton在此任教），工程和能源学科实力强劲。
desc.en: UAlberta is a global leader in AI research (Rich Sutton, father of reinforcement learning, teaches here). Strong engineering and energy programs.

safetyDetail.zh: 阿尔伯塔大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: University of Alberta campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

majorTuition.zh: 滑铁卢大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$40,750-C$64,070/年。
majorTuition.en: University of Waterloo international tuition varies: C$40,750-C$64,070/yr.

desc.zh: 滑铁卢大学拥有全球最大的Co-op带薪实习项目，CS和工程毕业生备受硅谷和华尔街青睐。
desc.en: UWaterloo has the world's largest co-op program. CS and engineering grads are highly sought by Silicon Valley and Wall Street.

safetyDetail.zh: 滑铁卢大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: University of Waterloo campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

majorTuition.en: Western University international tuition varies: C$35,000-C$49,200/yr.

desc.zh: Western的Ivey商学院是加拿大顶级商学院之一，以案例教学法闻名。校园被评为加拿大最美。
desc.en: Western's Ivey Business School is one of Canada's top business schools, known for case-based learning. Campus rated one of Canada's most beautiful.

safetyDetail.zh: 西安大略大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。

majorTuition.en: Queen's University international tuition varies: C$40,600-C$55,883/yr.

desc.zh: 女王大学Smith商学院全加顶尖，校园社区感极强，学生满意度常年第一。金斯顿是安全宜居的小城。
desc.en: Queen's Smith School of Business is among Canada's best. Extremely strong campus community with top student satisfaction. Kingston is a safe, livable city.

safetyDetail.zh: 女王大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: Queen's University campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

application.en:

📅 Deadline: Jan 15 - Mar 1
💰 Fee: C$100-180
📝 Required: Transcripts, personal profile, TOEFL/IELTS
✅ SAT/ACT generally not required

majorTuition.zh: 渥太华大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$35,000-C$45,192/年。
majorTuition.en: University of Ottawa international tuition varies: C$35,000-C$45,192/yr.

desc.zh: 渥太华大学是全球最大的英法双语大学，毗邻加拿大国会。政治学和法学因首都优势极具竞争力。
desc.en: UOttawa is the world's largest English-French bilingual university, next to Parliament. Political science and law benefit from the capital location.

safetyDetail.zh: 渥太华大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: University of Ottawa campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

visa.zh: Study Permit → 毕业后PGWP工签(最长3年) → Express Entry申请PR。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry. Canada has immigration-friendly policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 大一通常保证校内住宿（需提前申请）。校内约C$10,000-16,000/年。
housing.en: Freshman housing typically guaranteed (apply early). On-campus ~C$10,000-16,000/yr.

graduationRate.zh: 毕业率良好，学术支持完善。
graduationRate.en: Good graduation rates with strong academic support.

employment.zh: 加拿大就业市场稳定，Co-op项目提供实习机会。
employment.en: Stable Canadian job market. Co-op programs provide internship opportunities.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 强制购买UHIP保险约C$756/年。安大略省国际学生不享受OHIP。校内Health Centre提供基础医疗。
healthcare.en: ✅ MandatoryUHIP保险约C$756/年。安大略省国际学生不享受OHIP。On-campusHealth Centre提供基础医疗。

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105
📅 截止日期：1月15日-3月1日
💰 申请费：C$100-180
📝 所需材料：成绩单、个人简介、TOEFL/IELTS
✅ 大部分不要求SAT/ACT

city.zh: 阿尔伯塔省 卡尔加里

majorTuition.zh: 卡尔加里大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$30,000-C$38,560/年。
majorTuition.en: University of Calgary international tuition varies: C$30,000-C$38,560/yr.

desc.zh: 卡尔加里大学以能源工程闻名，Haskayne商学院与当地石油行业联系紧密。卡尔加里连年评为全球最宜居城市。
desc.en: UCalgary is known for energy engineering. Haskayne Business School has strong ties to the local oil industry. Calgary is consistently rated among the world's most livable cities.

safetyDetail.zh: 卡尔加里大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: University of Calgary campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

visa.zh: Study Permit → 毕业后PGWP工签(最长3年) → Express Entry申请PR。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry. Canada has immigration-friendly policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 大一通常保证校内住宿（需提前申请）。校内约C$10,000-16,000/年。
housing.en: Freshman housing typically guaranteed (apply early). On-campus ~C$10,000-16,000/yr.

graduationRate.zh: 毕业率良好，学术支持完善。
graduationRate.en: Good graduation rates with strong academic support.

employment.zh: 加拿大就业市场稳定，Co-op项目提供实习机会。
employment.en: Stable Canadian job market. Co-op programs provide internship opportunities.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 可加入AHCIP省医保。校内Health Centre提供基础医疗。
healthcare.en: ✅ 可加入AHCIP省医保。On-campusHealth Centre提供基础医疗。

city.zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省 本拿比

majorTuition.zh: 西蒙菲莎大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$28,000-C$35,400/年。
majorTuition.en: Simon Fraser University international tuition varies: C$28,000-C$35,400/yr.

desc.zh: SFU以Co-op项目和跨学科教学闻名。三学期制让学生可以更灵活地安排学业和实习。
desc.en: SFU is known for its co-op program and interdisciplinary approach. The trimester system allows flexible scheduling of academics and internships.

safetyDetail.zh: 西蒙菲莎大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: Simon Fraser University campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

visa.zh: Study Permit → 毕业后PGWP工签(最长3年) → Express Entry申请PR。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好。

employment.zh: 加拿大就业市场稳定，Co-op项目提供实习机会。
employment.en: Stable Canadian job market. Co-op programs provide internship opportunities.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 可加入BC省MSP医疗保险（等待期内需购买私保）。校内Student Health Service提供基础医疗。
healthcare.en: ✅ 可加入BC省MSP医疗保险（等待期内需购买私保）。On-campusStudent Health Service提供基础医疗。

city.zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省 维多利亚

majorTuition.zh: 维多利亚大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$26,000-C$33,240/年。
majorTuition.en: University of Victoria international tuition varies: C$26,000-C$33,240/yr.

desc.zh: 维多利亚大学以Co-op项目和海洋/气候研究闻名。维多利亚市气候温和，是加拿大最温暖的城市之一。
desc.en: UVic is known for co-op programs and ocean/climate research. Victoria has Canada's mildest climate, one of the country's warmest cities.

safetyDetail.zh: 维多利亚大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: University of Victoria campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

city.zh: 新斯科舍省 哈利法克斯

majorTuition.zh: 达尔豪斯大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$25,000-C$32,500/年。
majorTuition.en: Dalhousie University international tuition varies: C$25,000-C$32,500/yr.

desc.zh: 达尔豪斯是加拿大大西洋省份最好的大学，海洋科学全球领先。哈利法克斯生活成本较低，海滨城市氛围好。
desc.en: Dalhousie is the top university in Atlantic Canada with globally leading ocean sciences. Halifax has lower living costs and a great coastal city vibe.

safetyDetail.zh: 达尔豪斯大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: Dalhousie University campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

visa.zh: Study Permit → 毕业后PGWP工签(最长3年) → Express Entry申请PR。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry. Canada has immigration-friendly policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 大一通常保证校内住宿（需提前申请）。校内约C$10,000-16,000/年。
housing.en: Freshman housing typically guaranteed (apply early). On-campus ~C$10,000-16,000/yr.

graduationRate.zh: 毕业率良好，学术支持完善。
graduationRate.en: Good graduation rates with strong academic support.

employment.zh: 加拿大就业市场稳定，Co-op项目提供实习机会。
employment.en: Stable Canadian job market. Co-op programs provide internship opportunities.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 需购买私人医疗保险约C$900/年。校内Health Centre提供基础医疗。
healthcare.en: ✅ 需购买私人医疗保险约C$900/年。On-campusHealth Centre提供基础医疗。

city.zh: 魁北克省 蒙特利尔

majorTuition.zh: 蒙特利尔大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$24,000-C$31,176/年。
majorTuition.en: Université de Montréal international tuition varies: C$24,000-C$31,176/yr.

desc.zh: 蒙特利尔大学是加拿大最大的法语大学，AI研究全球领先（Yoshua Bengio所在的Mila实验室）。
desc.en: UdeM is Canada's largest French university with globally leading AI research (home to Yoshua Bengio's Mila lab).

safetyDetail.zh: 蒙特利尔大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: Université de Montréal campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷多雪，夏季温暖

visa.zh: Study Permit → 毕业后PGWP工签(最长3年) → Express Entry申请PR。加拿大移民政策对留学生友好。

healthcare.zh: ✅ 可申请RAMQ魁省医保（部分国家学生免费）。校内Health Centre提供医疗服务。

city.zh: 魁北克省 魁北克城

majorTuition.zh: 拉瓦尔大学国际生学费因专业差异大：C$22,000-C$28,000/年。
majorTuition.en: Université Laval international tuition varies: C$22,000-C$28,000/yr.

desc.zh: 拉瓦尔大学是加拿大第一所法语大学，林业和农业研究全加领先。魁北克城是北美最具欧洲风情的城市。
desc.en: Laval is Canada's first French university with leading forestry and agriculture research. Quebec City is North America's most European city.

safetyDetail.zh: 拉瓦尔大学校园安全良好。加拿大整体治安优秀。
safetyDetail.en: Université Laval campus is safe. Canada overall has excellent public safety.
